message:
fix: prevent molecule step wisps from being promoted to permanent beads (gt-uzui)

Molecule step wisps (those with a Parent field) are subordinate steps
of a patrol molecule. They should never be promoted to permanent beads
when past TTL — instead they are deleted. This prevents patrol molecule
steps from polluting the issues table, which was the primary source of
75% of promoted wisps being noise.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
